title: hieracium lanatum subvar. eriopsilon
intro: Hieracium lanatum subvar. eriopsilon, also known as Rough Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to stimulate the immune system and promote healing. In herbal preparations, Rough Hawkweed can be used in teas, infusions, and topical creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
